visual_description: A medium close-up shot shows a young man and a young woman standing face-to-face in a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor. The man, on the left, has shaggy brown hair and wears a dark, striped shirt. The woman, on the right, has her dark hair pulled back and wears a dark jacket over a reddish top. They are looking at each other intently. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The audio opens with a young man speaking in a calm, matter-of-fact tone, stating, "Yeah, I did." The camera remains steady as the man turns his head slightly away from the woman. The woman's expression is one of concern. The Chinese subtitles change, but the man and woman remain in the same positions. The lighting in the corridor shifts, with a bright, teal-colored light illuminating the background behind the man, creating a stark contrast with the darker foreground. The man turns his head back towards the woman, who now looks forward with a determined and slightly worried expression. The teal light continues to wash over the background. The camera angle shifts slightly, focusing more on the woman. She looks forward with a look of awe or admiration.
